creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
OK, so on my box after reintalling phpldapadmin I'm able to login without errors. 

And, yes there is one small mistake in patching 'lib/PLAAttribute.php'. After this small change PLA is working correctly.

Can you change /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/PLAAttribute.php at line 15 from Attribute to PLAAttribute? After that change can you login?

Maybe problem is with config.php file? Are you able to show (or email to me) your config (without credentials of course :-))) ). I will try to check it on my box.
